title: Review Contract Ledger
concept: A table-led Playground review console that treats Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, ZIP import, saved objects, and portability actions as stateful contracts tied to one protected live preview.
flows: Inspect distinct launch contracts for Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import with route-specific inputs, constraints, progress, and resulting active Playground identity

Run a Blueprint end to end by selecting a gallery item, inspecting blueprint.json, validating JSON, acknowledging replacement warning, running progress, mutating the active preview, updating shell identity, and recording an imported transfer result
Apply Settings Save & Reload end to end with WordPress/PHP/language/network controls, unsaved reset warning, stored reload explanation, progress, final runtime badge, and transfer history

Save a temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct consequences, file-copy progress, shell title mutation, storage badge change, saved row state, local permission state, and transfer result
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds through table rows for open, rename, delete confirmation, delete progress, and final deleted state

Use Site Manager operations for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, Adminer, phpMyAdmin, and Blueprint bundle actions while the embedded preview remains visible
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview input
Gutenberg PR or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser framing and replacement confirmation
Blueprint gallery categories and search framing with representative subset labeled 6 shown of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission and reconnect consequence
Save progress with file-copy counts
Saved, unsaved, local-directory, deleted, imported, and exported row states
Open, manage, rename, and delete saved Playgrounds
Delete confirmation, cancel, progress, final deleted state, and activity result
Current shell path input, refresh, Homepage, WP Admin, temporary/saved/local state, Save, and reset consequences
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite settings
Destructive unsaved reset warning and stored Save & Reload behavior
Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, and Logs
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, and save result
Blueprint editor with URL, validation, copy link, download bundle, run, replacement warning, progress, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty, notice, and warning states
Export to GitHub
Download active Playground as .zip
GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle portability actions
Transfer history tied to the active Playground identity and preview state
